name: 菜刀
shooting_angle: three-quarter view from right hand perspective
readable_text_policy: 不添加文字标签、logo、水印或说明字
scale_policy: realistic scale with hand palm as anchor
reference_context_policy: handheld in right hand or on table surface as scale reference, no clear stranger faces
reference_prompt: Realistic vegetable knife with 20cm straight iron gray blade and wooden handle, shown in scale context with partial hand grip or on neutral surface, iron blade wood handle, no text or markings, clean condition.。源记录硬约束：数量:1；位置:阿翠右手递向林辰；运动政策:轻微递出。源记录硬约束：数量:1；位置:阿翠双手递出粗布包裹的小型厨房工具，木柄朝外，金属部分完全不外露；运动政策:轻微递出，非攻击姿态，无挥动动作
